register.note: Full-width, composed, thumbnail-legible loss-surface poster with a labelled descent path landing on the minimum; legend now on a crisp panel and 'start' clear of the path. Matches the bar; flat-2D field keeps it off 4 vs the sculpted watch.

Where Seeing-Theory draws squared-error squares on residuals, the hero draws the actual loss surface (contour bowl) with the descent walk and minimum marked — the optimization mechanism is in the picture, not just the data.

Fix landed: see-spine now carries in-graphic labels ('data', 'least-squares fit', 'the line', 'loss (log)') so the chart self-explains in Distill's signaling style instead of leaning on adjacent prose — clears floor 3.

The See-it viewport is Distill-soft — warm paper, restrained gold/teal/blue, clear focal hierarchy, no aliasing — and the loss surface is now an anti-aliased contour map; matches Ciechanowski's restraint.

Judged conservatively from statics: a Play control, a scrub-through-time timeline, and a 'step / 500' counter show the descent animation is transitional and controllable like 3B1B's walk, not decorative.

Semantic grammar holds with R2D3-level discipline — gold=data, blue=the line, teal=control, crimson=loss used sparingly, purple=learning-rate knob — and the surface's cream-to-maroon field is a justified low-to-high encoding, not an all-red dilution.

hero.note: Full-width contour loss surface with a labelled descent path from 'start' to 'the minimum' and a crisp 'loss: low to high' legend panel — reads as a strong thumbnail poster; all five spec booleans pass.

assessment.note: The transfer item (transfer-slow-training) is now an OPEN prompt — the learner writes their own diagnosis + the one risk in the fix, then reveals a model answer — alongside the playable 'go over the edge' experiment-task and a predict-then-verify. No closed MCQ transfer.

verdict.summary: Clears the bar: all six register dimensions at floor 3, the hero spec passes, and the assessment form is fully open/interactive (open transfer). Remaining items are polish toward 4 (hero tactile depth).
